x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Financial data enables Now Assist HAM to generate AI total cost of ownership analysis and financially-informed refresh recommendations. Without cost data, AI refresh recommendations lack the financial dimension needed to prioritize investments.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No hardware asset records found", finding: "No hardware asset records. Financial data cannot be assessed." }; } var gaFinancial = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); gaFinancial.addQuery("cost", ">", "0"); gaFinancial.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaFinancial.query(); var withCost = gaFinancial.next() ? parseInt(gaFinancial.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withCost / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of hardware assets have cost data (" + withCost + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 75) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of hardware assets have cost data. Now Assist HAM can generate AI-powered total cost of ownership analysis and financially-informed refresh recommendations." }; } else if (pct >= 40) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of assets have cost data (target: 75%+). Now Assist HAM AI financial analysis will have incomplete coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of assets have cost data. Now Assist HAM cannot generate AI total cost of ownership analysis without financial data." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate purchase cost on hardware asset records. Import financial data from procurement systems or ERP. Cost data is required for Now Assist HAM to generate AI-powered TCO analysis and financially-informed refresh prioritization.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cce
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Financial data enables Now Assist HAM to generate AI total cost of ownership analysis and financially-informed refresh recommendations. Without cost data, AI refresh recommendations lack the financial dimension needed to prioritize investments.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Financial Data Population</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No hardware asset records found", finding: "No hardware asset records. Financial data cannot be assessed." }; } var gaFinancial = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); gaFinancial.addQuery("cost", ">", "0"); gaFinancial.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaFinancial.query(); var withCost = gaFinancial.next() ? parseInt(gaFinancial.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withCost / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of hardware assets have cost data (" + withCost + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 75) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of hardware assets have cost data. Now Assist HAM can generate AI-powered total cost of ownership analysis and financially-informed refresh recommendations." }; } else if (pct >= 40) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of assets have cost data (target: 75%+). Now Assist HAM AI financial analysis will have incomplete coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of assets have cost data. Now Assist HAM cannot generate AI total cost of ownership analysis without financial data." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>HAM</module> <number>CHK0006238</number> <order>600</order> <remediation_guidance>Populate purchase cost on hardware asset records. Import financial data from procurement systems or ERP. Cost data is required for Now Assist HAM to generate AI-powered TCO analysis and financially-informed refresh prioritization.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cce</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
